summary.key_theme: 公司透過擴展 Spectrum TV 應用程式與達成體育頻道轉播協議來強化服務生態，但市場對即將公布的 Q1 財報中寬頻業務成長壓力與成本上升持謹慎態度。

bullish.title: Charter Communications : MASN and Spectrum Announce Multiyear Carriage Agreement
bullish.reason: 與 MASN 達成多年期轉播協議，有助於穩定 Spectrum 的內容供應，減少潛在的頻道中斷風險，對用戶留存具有正面意義。

bullish.title: What's Going On With Charter Communications Stock On Friday? — Charter is expanding Spectrum TV App to Google TV and Android devices
bullish.reason: 選擇此篇作為代表，因其明確指出 Spectrum TV App 擴展至 Google TV 與 Android 裝置，此舉能增加串流服務的可及性，強化寬頻業務的附加價值。

bullish.title: Why Charter (CHTR) Stock Is Trading Up Today
bullish.reason: 股價在當日出現 2.6 % 的漲幅，顯示市場對公司近期策略調整與服務擴張給予正面回饋。

bearish.title: Charter Communications to Report Q1 Earnings: What's in the Cards? — CHTR heads into Q1 earnings with mobile strength offset by broadband pressure and rising costs.
bearish.reason: 市場預期雖然行動業務表現強勁，但寬頻用戶成長壓力與營運成本上升將對獲利能力構成挑戰，投資人對 Q1 財報持保留態度。

bearish.title: Charter Communications (CHTR) Reports Next Week: Wall Street Expects Earnings Growth — Charter (CHTR) doesn't possess the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat
bearish.reason: 華爾街分析師指出公司缺乏足以支撐財報超預期的關鍵指標，暗示市場對即將公布的財報結果預期較為保守。

neutral.title: Is Charter Communications (CHTR) Using Spectrum’s Google TV Expansion To Reinforce Its Broadband-Centric Strategy?
neutral.reason: 此篇為對 Spectrum TV App 擴張策略的分析性報導，探討其對寬頻業務的影響，屬於中性觀點的產業評論。

neutral.title: Why Charter (CHTR) Stock Is Trading Up Today
neutral.reason: 與 Yahoo 報導內容重複，僅作為股價變動的紀錄，未提供額外的新資訊。
